footer.tagline: A collaborative, free and open database of food products

homepage.title: Score My Recipe - Open Food Facts
homepage.badge: The open-source tool for collective catering
homepage.hero_title: Calculate the impact of your recipes
homepage.hero_description: Enter your ingredients naturally. Our tool structures your technical sheets, instantly calculates the Green-Score and helps you move towards more sustainable menus.
homepage.section2_description: Easily improve your technical sheets with reliable data.
homepage.feature1_description: Easily adjust a recipe's impact by "jamming" on quantities or testing ingredient substitutions on the fly.
homepage.feature2_description: A transparent calculation methodology, based on the rigor of the public Agribalyse database carried by ADEME.
homepage.feature3_description: Bet on a validated indicator already identified by millions of consumers on Open Food Facts and Yuka.
homepage.footer_text: An open-source project led by Open Food Facts, designed to transform the impact of catering.
homepage.footer_badge: Project carried out collaboratively thanks to the support of ADEME's Call for Commons
